# COMPASSION CREW

> COMPASSION CREW is a community-driven social impact organization dedicated to inspiring compassion, learning, and positive action. We bring together students, professionals, and leaders to connect and serve.

## Main Navigation Paths
- [Home](https://www.compassioncrew.in/): Compassion Crew homepage.
- [About Us](https://www.compassioncrew.in/about): Details about our mission, vision, and values.
- [Our Founder](https://www.compassioncrew.in/founder): Biography and message from our founder.
- [Our Team](https://www.compassioncrew.in/team): Meet the core members and coordinators of Compassion Crew.
- [Upcoming Events & Expert Talks](https://www.compassioncrew.in/events): Information on scheduled webinars, workshops, and interactive sessions.
- [Volunteer Portal](https://www.compassioncrew.in/volunteer): Join our volunteer network and contribute to social causes.
- [Support / Donate](https://www.compassioncrew.in/donate): Support our initiatives through financial contributions.
- [Event Registration](https://www.compassioncrew.in/register): Register for upcoming events and programs.

## Core Initiatives & Programs
- **Expert Talks & Knowledge Sessions**: Educational sessions led by social leaders and changemakers.
- **Community Engagement Events**: Collaborative discussions and personal growth networking sessions.
- **Volunteer & Service Initiatives**: Active community service drives and skills training.
- **Social Awareness Campaigns**: Education campaigns promoting environmental and social responsibility.
- **Compassion Projects**: Local support networks focusing on youth mentoring, animal welfare, and senior citizen aid.

## Contact Information
- **Email**: compasioncrew@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +91 8884156247
- **Address**: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- **Tax deduction**: Donations are not currently eligible for 80G tax deductions.
